name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new detector, adapter, evaluator, or capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem
<!-- What multi-agent failure or evaluation gap are you trying to address?
     Concrete agent behaviour, ideally — "my supervisor agent does X and I
     can't tell that's happening" beats "I want feature Y". -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- The shape of the feature you'd like. Doesn't need to be detailed — the
     conversation in the issue is where the design happens. -->

## Alternatives you've considered
<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem (including existing ProcessGuard
     features used differently). Helps reviewers understand the design space. -->

## MAST mapping (for new detectors)
<!-- If you're proposing a new detector, which MAST failure mode does it
     correspond to? Cite the arxiv paper section if possible:
     https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.13657 -->

## Additional context
<!-- Anything else — links to related work, motivating traces, etc. -->
